framework.name: ISO 27001:2022
framework.description: Information security, cybersecurity and privacy protection — Information security management systems — Requirements

controls.title: Policies for information security
controls.description: This control establishes and maintains information security policies aligned with organizational objectives. Measures include defining scope, setting goals, and ensuring alignment with compliance requirements.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control establishes and maintains information security policies aligned with organizational objectives. Measures include defining scope, setting goals, and ensuring alignment with compliance requirements.

controls.title: Information security roles and responsibilities
controls.description: This control defines and assigns roles and responsibilities for information security to ensure accountability. Measures include clear documentation of responsibilities, periodic reviews, and enforcement mechanisms.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control defines and assigns roles and responsibilities for information security to ensure accountability. Measures include clear documentation of responsibilities, periodic reviews, and enforcement mechanisms.

controls.title: Segregation of duties
controls.description: This control ensures segregation of duties to reduce the risk of errors, fraud, and unauthorized access. Measures include role separation, access restrictions, and regular audits.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures segregation of duties to reduce the risk of errors, fraud, and unauthorized access. Measures include role separation, access restrictions, and regular audits.

controls.title: Management responsibilities
controls.description: This control ensures management responsibilities for information security are clearly defined and implemented. Measures include setting objectives, allocating resources, and overseeing compliance.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures management responsibilities for information security are clearly defined and implemented. Measures include setting objectives, allocating resources, and overseeing compliance.

controls.title: Contact with authorities
controls.description: This control ensures timely communication with relevant authorities during information security incidents. Measures include establishing contact protocols, maintaining updated contact lists, and assigning responsibilities.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures timely communication with relevant authorities during information security incidents. Measures include establishing contact protocols, maintaining updated contact lists, and assigning responsibilities.

controls.title: Contact with special interest groups
controls.description: This control facilitates contact with special interest groups to stay informed about security trends and practices. Measures include participation in forums, memberships, and collaborative initiatives.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control facilitates contact with special interest groups to stay informed about security trends and practices. Measures include participation in forums, memberships, and collaborative initiatives.

controls.title: Threat intelligence
controls.description: This control ensures threat intelligence is developed and maintained to identify and mitigate security risks. Measures include monitoring threat feeds, analyzing trends, and sharing actionable insights.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures threat intelligence is developed and maintained to identify and mitigate security risks. Measures include monitoring threat feeds, analyzing trends, and sharing actionable insights.

controls.title: Information security in project management
controls.description: This control incorporates information security into project management practices. Measures include risk assessments, compliance reviews, and security checkpoints during project lifecycles.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control incorporates information security into project management practices. Measures include risk assessments, compliance reviews, and security checkpoints during project lifecycles.

controls.title: Inventory of information and other associated assets
controls.description: This control ensures an accurate inventory of information and associated assets is maintained. Measures include asset tracking, periodic audits, and classification by sensitivity.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures an accurate inventory of information and associated assets is maintained. Measures include asset tracking, periodic audits, and classification by sensitivity.

controls.title: Acceptable use of information and other associated assets
controls.description: This control defines acceptable use of information and associated assets to ensure proper handling. Measures include documented policies, user training, and enforcement mechanisms.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control defines acceptable use of information and associated assets to ensure proper handling. Measures include documented policies, user training, and enforcement mechanisms.

controls.title: Return of assets
controls.description: This control ensures the secure return of assets when employees or contractors leave or change roles. Measures include checklists, asset tracking, and decommissioning protocols.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures the secure return of assets when employees or contractors leave or change roles. Measures include checklists, asset tracking, and decommissioning protocols.

controls.title: Classification of information
controls.description: This control ensures information is classified based on its sensitivity and value to ensure appropriate protection. Measures include classification schemes, access restrictions, and labeling guidelines.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures information is classified based on its sensitivity and value to ensure appropriate protection. Measures include classification schemes, access restrictions, and labeling guidelines.

controls.title: Labelling of information
controls.description: This control ensures consistent labeling of information to reflect its classification and handling requirements. Measures include standardized templates, training, and audits.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures consistent labeling of information to reflect its classification and handling requirements. Measures include standardized templates, training, and audits.

controls.title: Information transfer
controls.description: This control establishes secure processes for transferring information between systems or organizations. Measures include encryption, access controls, and secure transfer protocols.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control establishes secure processes for transferring information between systems or organizations. Measures include encryption, access controls, and secure transfer protocols.

controls.title: Access control
controls.description: This control implements and maintains access control mechanisms to restrict access to authorized individuals. Measures include role-based access, multi-factor authentication, and periodic reviews.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control implements and maintains access control mechanisms to restrict access to authorized individuals. Measures include role-based access, multi-factor authentication, and periodic reviews.

controls.title: Identity management
controls.description: This control ensures identities are managed securely to guarantee accurate and reliable access to systems. Measures include identity verification, lifecycle management, and access provisioning.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures identities are managed securely to guarantee accurate and reliable access to systems. Measures include identity verification, lifecycle management, and access provisioning.

controls.title: Authentication information
controls.description: This control protects authentication information, such as passwords, to prevent unauthorized access. Measures include encryption, secure storage, and periodic password updates.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control protects authentication information, such as passwords, to prevent unauthorized access. Measures include encryption, secure storage, and periodic password updates.

controls.title: Access rights
controls.description: This control ensures access rights are regularly reviewed and managed to align with roles and responsibilities. Measures include periodic audits, access revocation, and automated access management.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures access rights are regularly reviewed and managed to align with roles and responsibilities. Measures include periodic audits, access revocation, and automated access management.

controls.title: Information security in supplier relationships
controls.description: This control ensures information security is embedded in supplier relationships and processes. Measures include due diligence, security reviews, and ongoing monitoring.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures information security is embedded in supplier relationships and processes. Measures include due diligence, security reviews, and ongoing monitoring.

controls.title: Addressing information security within supplier agreements
controls.description: This control addresses information security requirements within supplier agreements. Measures include explicit contract clauses, compliance audits, and defined penalties for violations.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control addresses information security requirements within supplier agreements. Measures include explicit contract clauses, compliance audits, and defined penalties for violations.

controls.title: Managing information security in the ICT supply chain
controls.description: This control manages information security risks in the ICT supply chain to ensure security of services and components. Measures include risk assessments, supplier evaluations, and incident response protocols.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control manages information security risks in the ICT supply chain to ensure security of services and components. Measures include risk assessments, supplier evaluations, and incident response protocols.

controls.title: Monitor, review and change management of supplier services
controls.description: This control ensures supplier services are monitored, reviewed, and adjusted to maintain information security. Measures include service level agreements, periodic reviews, and contract updates.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures supplier services are monitored, reviewed, and adjusted to maintain information security. Measures include service level agreements, periodic reviews, and contract updates.

controls.title: Information security for use of cloud services
controls.description: This control ensures the secure use of cloud services by addressing associated risks. Measures include data encryption, access controls, and provider compliance reviews.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures the secure use of cloud services by addressing associated risks. Measures include data encryption, access controls, and provider compliance reviews.

controls.title: Information security incident management planning and preparation
controls.description: This control ensures proper planning and preparation for managing information security incidents. Measures include incident response plans, training exercises, and communication protocols.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures proper planning and preparation for managing information security incidents. Measures include incident response plans, training exercises, and communication protocols.

controls.title: Assessment and decision on information security events
controls.description: This control establishes processes for assessing and deciding on actions related to information security events. Measures include root cause analysis, risk evaluation, and mitigation plans.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control establishes processes for assessing and deciding on actions related to information security events. Measures include root cause analysis, risk evaluation, and mitigation plans.

controls.title: Response to information security incidents
controls.description: This control ensures effective response to information security incidents to minimize impact and recover quickly. Measures include incident reporting, escalation protocols, and containment strategies.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures effective response to information security incidents to minimize impact and recover quickly. Measures include incident reporting, escalation protocols, and containment strategies.

controls.title: Learning from information security incidents
controls.description: This control ensures lessons learned from information security incidents are documented and implemented to improve processes. Measures include post-incident reviews, action plans, and policy updates.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures lessons learned from information security incidents are documented and implemented to improve processes. Measures include post-incident reviews, action plans, and policy updates.

controls.title: Collection of evidence
controls.description: This control ensures evidence is collected and preserved during security incidents to support investigations. Measures include chain-of-custody procedures, secure storage, and access controls.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures evidence is collected and preserved during security incidents to support investigations. Measures include chain-of-custody procedures, secure storage, and access controls.

controls.title: Information security during disruption
controls.description: This control ensures information security is maintained during disruptions to guarantee continuity of operations. Measures include contingency plans, backup systems, and failover mechanisms.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures information security is maintained during disruptions to guarantee continuity of operations. Measures include contingency plans, backup systems, and failover mechanisms.

controls.title: ICT readiness for business continuity
controls.description: This control ensures ICT readiness for business continuity to minimize downtime during disruptions. Measures include testing recovery plans, redundant systems, and disaster recovery sites.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures ICT readiness for business continuity to minimize downtime during disruptions. Measures include testing recovery plans, redundant systems, and disaster recovery sites.
aiRiskDomains: AI System Safety, Failures, and Limitations

controls.title: Legal, statutory, regulatory and contractual requirements
controls.description: This control ensures compliance with legal, statutory, regulatory, and contractual information security requirements. Measures include policy reviews, audits, and evidence documentation.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures compliance with legal, statutory, regulatory, and contractual information security requirements. Measures include policy reviews, audits, and evidence documentation.

controls.title: Intellectual property rights
controls.description: This control ensures intellectual property rights are protected through appropriate information security measures. Measures include access restrictions, encryption, and legal agreements.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures intellectual property rights are protected through appropriate information security measures. Measures include access restrictions, encryption, and legal agreements.

controls.title: Protection of records
controls.description: This control ensures records are securely stored and protected to prevent loss or unauthorized access. Measures include retention policies, secure storage, and access controls.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures records are securely stored and protected to prevent loss or unauthorized access. Measures include retention policies, secure storage, and access controls.

controls.title: Privacy and protection of PII
controls.description: This control protects privacy and ensures the secure handling of personally identifiable information (PII). Measures include anonymization, encryption, and compliance with privacy laws.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control protects privacy and ensures the secure handling of personally identifiable information (PII). Measures include anonymization, encryption, and compliance with privacy laws.

controls.title: Independent review of information security
controls.description: This control ensures independent reviews of information security to evaluate effectiveness and compliance. Measures include external audits, risk assessments, and follow-up actions.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures independent reviews of information security to evaluate effectiveness and compliance. Measures include external audits, risk assessments, and follow-up actions.

controls.title: Compliance with policies, rules and standards for information security
controls.description: This control ensures compliance with all policies, rules, and standards for information security. Measures include regular training, policy reviews, and enforcement mechanisms.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures compliance with all policies, rules, and standards for information security. Measures include regular training, policy reviews, and enforcement mechanisms.

controls.title: Documented operating procedures
controls.description: This control develops and maintains documented operating procedures to ensure consistency in security practices. Measures include process documentation, version control, and accessibility.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control develops and maintains documented operating procedures to ensure consistency in security practices. Measures include process documentation, version control, and accessibility.

controls.title: Screening
controls.description: This control ensures the implementation of screening processes to verify the suitability of candidates before employment. Measures include background checks, identity verification, and assessment of qualifications to reduce security risks.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures the implementation of screening processes to verify the suitability of candidates before employment. Measures include background checks, identity verification, and assessment of qualifications to reduce security risks.

controls.title: Terms and conditions of employment
controls.description: This control ensures that terms and conditions of employment include information security responsibilities. Measures include explicit clauses about confidentiality, compliance with policies, and consequences for breaches.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures that terms and conditions of employment include information security responsibilities. Measures include explicit clauses about confidentiality, compliance with policies, and consequences for breaches.

controls.title: Information security awareness, education and training
controls.description: This control ensures that employees receive regular information security awareness, education, and training. Measures include scheduled training sessions, e-learning programs, and simulated phishing exercises.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures that employees receive regular information security awareness, education, and training. Measures include scheduled training sessions, e-learning programs, and simulated phishing exercises.

controls.title: Disciplinary process
controls.description: This control establishes a disciplinary process to address breaches of information security policies. Measures include clear guidelines, escalation procedures, and consistent enforcement to maintain accountability.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control establishes a disciplinary process to address breaches of information security policies. Measures include clear guidelines, escalation procedures, and consistent enforcement to maintain accountability.

controls.title: Responsibilities after termination or change of employment
controls.description: This control ensures that responsibilities related to information security are defined and enforced after termination or role changes. Measures include revoking access rights, collecting organizational assets, and conducting exit interviews.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures that responsibilities related to information security are defined and enforced after termination or role changes. Measures include revoking access rights, collecting organizational assets, and conducting exit interviews.

controls.title: Confidentiality or non-disclosure agreements
controls.description: This control implements confidentiality or non-disclosure agreements to protect sensitive information. Measures include signed agreements at the start of employment, periodic reminders, and enforcement of legal actions in case of violations.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control implements confidentiality or non-disclosure agreements to protect sensitive information. Measures include signed agreements at the start of employment, periodic reminders, and enforcement of legal actions in case of violations.

controls.title: Remote working
controls.description: This control ensures the secure management of information security risks during remote working. Measures include secure access to corporate systems, mandatory use of VPNs, and policies for handling sensitive data remotely.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures the secure management of information security risks during remote working. Measures include secure access to corporate systems, mandatory use of VPNs, and policies for handling sensitive data remotely.

controls.title: Information security event reporting
controls.description: This control ensures employees can promptly report information security events. Measures include incident reporting channels, awareness campaigns, and follow-up procedures to investigate and address reported events.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures employees can promptly report information security events. Measures include incident reporting channels, awareness campaigns, and follow-up procedures to investigate and address reported events.

controls.title: Physical security perimeters
controls.description: This control establishes physical security perimeters to protect critical areas from unauthorized access. Measures include barriers, access controls, and monitoring systems to ensure only authorized individuals can enter.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control establishes physical security perimeters to protect critical areas from unauthorized access. Measures include barriers, access controls, and monitoring systems to ensure only authorized individuals can enter.

controls.title: Physical entry
controls.description: This control ensures physical entry points are controlled and monitored to prevent unauthorized access. Measures include badge systems, security personnel, and visitor logs.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures physical entry points are controlled and monitored to prevent unauthorized access. Measures include badge systems, security personnel, and visitor logs.

controls.title: Securing offices, rooms and facilities
controls.description: This control ensures that offices, rooms, and facilities are secured to protect information and resources. Measures include locked doors, restricted areas, and surveillance systems.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures that offices, rooms, and facilities are secured to protect information and resources. Measures include locked doors, restricted areas, and surveillance systems.

controls.title: Physical security monitoring
controls.description: This control implements physical security monitoring to detect and respond promptly to threats. Measures include CCTV systems, motion detectors, and real-time alerts.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control implements physical security monitoring to detect and respond promptly to threats. Measures include CCTV systems, motion detectors, and real-time alerts.

controls.title: Protecting against physical and environmental threats
controls.description: This control protects systems and resources from physical and environmental threats. Measures include fire suppression systems, temperature controls, and flood prevention barriers.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control protects systems and resources from physical and environmental threats. Measures include fire suppression systems, temperature controls, and flood prevention barriers.

controls.title: Working In secure areas
controls.description: This control ensures that secure areas are managed to allow authorized access only. Measures include access control systems, visitor escorts, and activity monitoring.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures that secure areas are managed to allow authorized access only. Measures include access control systems, visitor escorts, and activity monitoring.

controls.title: Clear desk and clear screen
controls.description: This control ensures sensitive information is not left exposed by adopting clear desk and clear screen policies. Measures include locking sensitive documents away and auto-locking screens when not in use.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures sensitive information is not left exposed by adopting clear desk and clear screen policies. Measures include locking sensitive documents away and auto-locking screens when not in use.

controls.title: Equipment siting and protection
controls.description: This control ensures that equipment is positioned and protected to prevent unauthorized access or damage. Measures include secure mounting, locked cabinets, and restricted access areas.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures that equipment is positioned and protected to prevent unauthorized access or damage. Measures include secure mounting, locked cabinets, and restricted access areas.

controls.title: Security of assets off-premises
controls.description: This control ensures assets used or stored off-premises are secured to maintain confidentiality and integrity. Measures include encryption, secure transport, and access tracking.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures assets used or stored off-premises are secured to maintain confidentiality and integrity. Measures include encryption, secure transport, and access tracking.
aiRiskDomains: AI System Safety, Failures, and Limitations

controls.title: Storage media
controls.description: This control safeguards storage media to prevent unauthorized access or tampering. Measures include secure storage, encryption, and access restrictions.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control safeguards storage media to prevent unauthorized access or tampering. Measures include secure storage, encryption, and access restrictions.

controls.title: Supporting utilities
controls.description: This control ensures that supporting utilities, such as power and cooling systems, are reliable and protected from disruptions. Measures include redundant systems and physical security.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures that supporting utilities, such as power and cooling systems, are reliable and protected from disruptions. Measures include redundant systems and physical security.

controls.title: Cabling security
controls.description: This control ensures that cables are secured to prevent unauthorized interception or damage. Measures include protective conduits, proper labeling, and secure routing.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures that cables are secured to prevent unauthorized interception or damage. Measures include protective conduits, proper labeling, and secure routing.

controls.title: Equipment maintenance
controls.description: This control ensures that equipment is maintained to guarantee proper functioning and prevent failures. Measures include regular servicing, secure maintenance practices, and authorized personnel access.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures that equipment is maintained to guarantee proper functioning and prevent failures. Measures include regular servicing, secure maintenance practices, and authorized personnel access.
aiRiskDomains: AI System Safety, Failures, and Limitations

controls.title: Secure disposal or re-use of equipment
controls.description: This control ensures the secure disposal or reuse of equipment to protect sensitive information. Measures include data sanitization, physical destruction, and certified disposal processes.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures the secure disposal or reuse of equipment to protect sensitive information. Measures include data sanitization, physical destruction, and certified disposal processes.

controls.title: User end point devices
controls.description: This control ensures the protection of endpoint devices such as laptops, desktops, and mobile devices by implementing security measures like endpoint detection, encryption, and secure configurations to minimize risks.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures the protection of endpoint devices such as laptops, desktops, and mobile devices by implementing security measures like endpoint detection, encryption, and secure configurations to minimize risks.

controls.title: Privileged access rights
controls.description: This control ensures that privileged access rights are granted, managed, and monitored carefully to prevent misuse and enhance security. Measures include role-based access controls, periodic reviews, and strict account management.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures that privileged access rights are granted, managed, and monitored carefully to prevent misuse and enhance security. Measures include role-based access controls, periodic reviews, and strict account management.

controls.title: Information access restriction
controls.description: This control restricts access to sensitive information based on need-to-know principles. Measures include user authentication, role-based permissions, and regular access reviews.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control restricts access to sensitive information based on need-to-know principles. Measures include user authentication, role-based permissions, and regular access reviews.

controls.title: Access to source code
controls.description: This control secures access to source code by preventing unauthorized viewing, modification, or exposure. Measures include version control, secure repositories, and restricted developer access.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control secures access to source code by preventing unauthorized viewing, modification, or exposure. Measures include version control, secure repositories, and restricted developer access.

controls.title: Secure authentication
controls.description: This control implements strong authentication mechanisms, such as multi-factor authentication, to verify user identities and prevent unauthorized access.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control implements strong authentication mechanisms, such as multi-factor authentication, to verify user identities and prevent unauthorized access.

controls.title: Capacity management
controls.description: This control ensures system capacity is managed to provide adequate performance and prevent disruptions. Measures include monitoring resource usage and planning for future needs.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures system capacity is managed to provide adequate performance and prevent disruptions. Measures include monitoring resource usage and planning for future needs.

controls.title: Protection against malware
controls.description: This control deploys measures like antivirus software, threat detection tools, and regular updates to protect systems from malware and malicious attacks.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control deploys measures like antivirus software, threat detection tools, and regular updates to protect systems from malware and malicious attacks.

controls.title: Management of technical vulnerabilities
controls.description: This control identifies, evaluates, and remediates technical vulnerabilities promptly to minimize security risks. Measures include vulnerability scanning and patch management.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control identifies, evaluates, and remediates technical vulnerabilities promptly to minimize security risks. Measures include vulnerability scanning and patch management.

controls.title: Configuration management
controls.description: This control ensures consistent management of system configurations to maintain security settings and prevent unauthorized changes.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures consistent management of system configurations to maintain security settings and prevent unauthorized changes.

controls.title: Information deletion
controls.description: This control ensures sensitive information is securely deleted when no longer required to prevent unauthorized recovery or exposure.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures sensitive information is securely deleted when no longer required to prevent unauthorized recovery or exposure.

controls.title: Data masking
controls.description: This control protects sensitive information during processing or display by using data masking techniques to obscure data from unauthorized users.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control protects sensitive information during processing or display by using data masking techniques to obscure data from unauthorized users.

controls.title: Data leakage prevention
controls.description: This control implements mechanisms to prevent the accidental exposure of sensitive data through email, removable media, or other channels.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control implements mechanisms to prevent the accidental exposure of sensitive data through email, removable media, or other channels.

controls.title: Information backup
controls.description: This control ensures critical information is backed up regularly and securely to ensure its availability in case of incidents or disasters.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures critical information is backed up regularly and securely to ensure its availability in case of incidents or disasters.
aiRiskDomains: AI System Safety, Failures, and Limitations

controls.title: Redundancy of information processing facilities
controls.description: This control ensures redundancy is built into processing facilities to maintain availability and operations during system failures or emergencies.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures redundancy is built into processing facilities to maintain availability and operations during system failures or emergencies.
aiRiskDomains: AI System Safety, Failures, and Limitations

controls.title: Logging
controls.description: This control enables logging of activities within systems to support monitoring, incident detection, and forensic investigations.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control enables logging of activities within systems to support monitoring, incident detection, and forensic investigations.

controls.title: Monitoring activities
controls.description: This control ensures the ongoing monitoring of system activities to detect, respond to, and mitigate security threats.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures the ongoing monitoring of system activities to detect, respond to, and mitigate security threats.

controls.title: Clock synchronization
controls.description: This control ensures system clocks are synchronized to maintain accurate and consistent timestamps for logs and other critical processes.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures system clocks are synchronized to maintain accurate and consistent timestamps for logs and other critical processes.

controls.title: Use of privileged utility programs
controls.description: This control restricts and monitors the use of privileged utility programs to prevent misuse and unauthorized actions.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control restricts and monitors the use of privileged utility programs to prevent misuse and unauthorized actions.

controls.title: Installation of software on operational systems
controls.description: This control ensures software installation on operational systems is managed securely to prevent vulnerabilities or unauthorized changes.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures software installation on operational systems is managed securely to prevent vulnerabilities or unauthorized changes.

controls.title: Networks security
controls.description: This control ensures network security through firewalls, intrusion detection systems, and access controls to protect against unauthorized access and attacks.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures network security through firewalls, intrusion detection systems, and access controls to protect against unauthorized access and attacks.

controls.title: Security of network services
controls.description: This control ensures network services are protected to maintain confidentiality, integrity, and availability during use.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures network services are protected to maintain confidentiality, integrity, and availability during use.
aiRiskDomains: AI System Safety, Failures, and Limitations

controls.title: Segregation of networks
controls.description: This control implements network segregation to limit the spread of threats and minimize the impact of potential breaches.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control implements network segregation to limit the spread of threats and minimize the impact of potential breaches.

controls.title: Web filtering
controls.description: This control uses web filtering tools to block unauthorized or harmful content from being accessed over the internet.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control uses web filtering tools to block unauthorized or harmful content from being accessed over the internet.

controls.title: Use of cryptography
controls.description: This control ensures cryptographic techniques are applied to protect data confidentiality, integrity, and authenticity.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures cryptographic techniques are applied to protect data confidentiality, integrity, and authenticity.
aiRiskDomains: AI System Safety, Failures, and Limitations

controls.title: Secure development life cycle
controls.description: This control integrates security into all stages of the development life cycle to ensure systems and applications are built securely.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control integrates security into all stages of the development life cycle to ensure systems and applications are built securely.

controls.title: Application security requirements
controls.description: This control defines and enforces security requirements for applications to safeguard against vulnerabilities.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control defines and enforces security requirements for applications to safeguard against vulnerabilities.

controls.title: Secure system architecture and engineering principles
controls.description: This control ensures secure design principles are adopted during the development of system architectures.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures secure design principles are adopted during the development of system architectures.

controls.title: Secure coding
controls.description: This control implements secure coding practices to minimize vulnerabilities in developed software.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control implements secure coding practices to minimize vulnerabilities in developed software.

controls.title: Security testing in development and acceptance
controls.description: This control ensures security testing is conducted during development and acceptance phases to identify weaknesses.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures security testing is conducted during development and acceptance phases to identify weaknesses.
aiRiskDomains: AI System Safety, Failures, and Limitations

controls.title: Outsourced development
controls.description: This control ensures security risks are managed effectively when development is outsourced to third-party vendors.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures security risks are managed effectively when development is outsourced to third-party vendors.

controls.title: Separation of development, test and production environments
controls.description: This control ensures development, test, and production environments are segregated to prevent unintended interactions and unauthorized access.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures development, test, and production environments are segregated to prevent unintended interactions and unauthorized access.

controls.title: Change management
controls.description: This control ensures changes to systems are managed securely to minimize risks and maintain operational stability.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures changes to systems are managed securely to minimize risks and maintain operational stability.

controls.title: Test information
controls.description: This control protects test data to prevent the exposure of sensitive or confidential information during testing processes.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control protects test data to prevent the exposure of sensitive or confidential information during testing processes.
aiRiskDomains: AI System Safety, Failures, and Limitations

controls.title: Protection of information systems during audit testing
controls.description: This control ensures that systems and data are safeguarded during audits by preventing unauthorized access, data leakage, or disruptions. Measures include using non-production environments, access restrictions, and confidentiality agreements to maintain system security and integrity.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures that systems and data are safeguarded during audits by preventing unauthorized access, data leakage, or disruptions. Measures include using non-production environments, access restrictions, and confidentiality agreements to maintain system security and integrity.
aiRiskDomains: AI System Safety, Failures, and Limitations

controls.title: Understanding the organization and its context
controls.description: Identify internal and external factors that influence the organization’s ability to achieve information security objectives, ensuring the ISMS is aligned with its context.
controls.implementationGuidance: Identify internal and external factors that influence the organization’s ability to achieve information security objectives, ensuring the ISMS is aligned with its context.

controls.title: Understanding the needs and expectations of interested parties
controls.description: Analyze the needs and expectations of interested parties to incorporate them into the ISMS and address relevant information security requirements.
controls.implementationGuidance: Analyze the needs and expectations of interested parties to incorporate them into the ISMS and address relevant information security requirements.

controls.title: Determining the scope of the information security management system
controls.description: Define the scope of the ISMS by considering internal and external factors, stakeholder needs, and dependencies within the operational environment.
controls.implementationGuidance: Define the scope of the ISMS by considering internal and external factors, stakeholder needs, and dependencies within the operational environment.

controls.title: Information security management system
controls.description: Build, run, and continually improve an ISMS to effectively manage information security risks and meet organizational goals.
controls.implementationGuidance: Build, run, and continually improve an ISMS to effectively manage information security risks and meet organizational goals.

controls.title: Leadership and commitment
controls.description: Demonstrate leadership and commitment by supporting the ISMS, aligning it with organizational objectives, allocating resources, promoting a security culture, and driving continual improvement.
controls.implementationGuidance: Demonstrate leadership and commitment by supporting the ISMS, aligning it with organizational objectives, allocating resources, promoting a security culture, and driving continual improvement.

controls.title: Policy
controls.description: Establish an information security policy aligned with the organization's objectives and strategic direction, outlining commitments to compliance, continual improvement, and the promotion of information security.
controls.implementationGuidance: Establish an information security policy aligned with the organization's objectives and strategic direction, outlining commitments to compliance, continual improvement, and the promotion of information security.

controls.title: Organizational roles, responsibilities and authorities
controls.description: Define, assign, and communicate roles, responsibilities, and authorities to ensure the effective implementation and operation of the ISMS, with accountability aligned to organizational objectives.
controls.implementationGuidance: Define, assign, and communicate roles, responsibilities, and authorities to ensure the effective implementation and operation of the ISMS, with accountability aligned to organizational objectives.

controls.title: General
controls.description: Establish a process to identify information security risks and opportunities, considering internal and external factors, stakeholder needs, and applicable requirements to ensure the ISMS achieves its objectives.
controls.implementationGuidance: Establish a process to identify information security risks and opportunities, considering internal and external factors, stakeholder needs, and applicable requirements to ensure the ISMS achieves its objectives.

controls.title: Information security risk assessment requirement
controls.description: Establish a process to assess information security risks at planned intervals, using defined criteria to evaluate threats to confidentiality, integrity, and availability, ensuring consistent and reliable results.
controls.implementationGuidance: Establish a process to assess information security risks at planned intervals, using defined criteria to evaluate threats to confidentiality, integrity, and availability, ensuring consistent and reliable results.
aiRiskDomains: AI System Safety, Failures, and Limitations

controls.title: Information security risk treatment
controls.description: Define a process to address identified information security risks by selecting appropriate controls, ensuring alignment with risk acceptance criteria, and documenting them in a risk treatment plan.
controls.implementationGuidance: Define a process to address identified information security risks by selecting appropriate controls, ensuring alignment with risk acceptance criteria, and documenting them in a risk treatment plan.

controls.title: Information security objectives and planning to achieve them
controls.description: Set measurable information security objectives aligned with the ISMS and strategic goals, and plan actions detailing responsibilities, resources, timelines, and evaluation methods to achieve them.
controls.implementationGuidance: Set measurable information security objectives aligned with the ISMS and strategic goals, and plan actions detailing responsibilities, resources, timelines, and evaluation methods to achieve them.

controls.title: Planning for changes
controls.description: Plan changes to the ISMS systematically to ensure alignment with information security requirements, seamless integration into existing processes, and effective risk management.
controls.implementationGuidance: Plan changes to the ISMS systematically to ensure alignment with information security requirements, seamless integration into existing processes, and effective risk management.

controls.title: Resources
controls.description: Provide the necessary resources to build, run, and continually improve the ISMS, ensuring its effective operation and alignment with organizational goals.
controls.implementationGuidance: Provide the necessary resources to build, run, and continually improve the ISMS, ensuring its effective operation and alignment with organizational goals.

controls.title: Competence
controls.description: Ensure personnel involved in the ISMS possess the necessary competence through appropriate education, training, or experience to fulfill their responsibilities effectively.
controls.implementationGuidance: Ensure personnel involved in the ISMS possess the necessary competence through appropriate education, training, or experience to fulfill their responsibilities effectively.

controls.title: Awareness
controls.description: Promote awareness among relevant personnel about the ISMS, their role in information security, and the importance of compliance with security policies and requirements.
controls.implementationGuidance: Promote awareness among relevant personnel about the ISMS, their role in information security, and the importance of compliance with security policies and requirements.

controls.title: Communication
controls.description: Establish effective internal and external communication processes, ensuring the timely and appropriate exchange of information relevant to the ISMS and its objectives.
controls.implementationGuidance: Establish effective internal and external communication processes, ensuring the timely and appropriate exchange of information relevant to the ISMS and its objectives.

controls.title: General
controls.description: Document the ISMS as needed to ensure effective planning, operation, control of processes, and alignment with organizational requirements.
controls.implementationGuidance: Document the ISMS as needed to ensure effective planning, operation, control of processes, and alignment with organizational requirements.

controls.title: Creating and Updating documented information
controls.description: Ensure ISMS documentation is appropriately created, updated, and controlled, including proper approval and version management.
controls.implementationGuidance: Ensure ISMS documentation is appropriately created, updated, and controlled, including proper approval and version management.

controls.title: Control of documented information
controls.description: Make ISMS documentation accessible and usable for those who need it, while protecting it from unauthorized access or loss.
controls.implementationGuidance: Make ISMS documentation accessible and usable for those who need it, while protecting it from unauthorized access or loss.

controls.title: Operational planning and control
controls.description: Plan and control ISMS processes, ensuring consistency with requirements and making necessary adjustments to address risks and opportunities.
controls.implementationGuidance: Plan and control ISMS processes, ensuring consistency with requirements and making necessary adjustments to address risks and opportunities.

controls.title: Information security risk assessment
controls.description: Implement the risk assessment process to identify, evaluate, and prioritize information security risks as defined in the ISMS framework.
controls.implementationGuidance: Implement the risk assessment process to identify, evaluate, and prioritize information security risks as defined in the ISMS framework.

controls.title: Information security risk treatment
controls.description: Apply the risk treatment process by selecting and implementing appropriate controls to address identified risks, ensuring alignment with the organization’s risk acceptance criteria.
controls.implementationGuidance: Apply the risk treatment process by selecting and implementing appropriate controls to address identified risks, ensuring alignment with the organization’s risk acceptance criteria.

controls.title: Monitoring, measurement, analysis, evaluation
controls.description: Monitor, measure, analyze, and evaluate the ISMS’s performance and effectiveness using appropriate methods aligned with the organization’s objectives.
controls.implementationGuidance: Monitor, measure, analyze, and evaluate the ISMS’s performance and effectiveness using appropriate methods aligned with the organization’s objectives.

controls.title: General
controls.description: Conduct internal audits at planned intervals to ensure the ISMS complies with ISO/IEC 27001 requirements and is effectively implemented and maintained.
controls.implementationGuidance: Conduct internal audits at planned intervals to ensure the ISMS complies with ISO/IEC 27001 requirements and is effectively implemented and maintained.

controls.title: Internal audit programme
controls.description: Plan and perform internal audits, including defining criteria, scope, methods, and responsibilities, and report the results to relevant management.
controls.implementationGuidance: Plan and perform internal audits, including defining criteria, scope, methods, and responsibilities, and report the results to relevant management.

controls.title: General
controls.description: Review the ISMS periodically to ensure its suitability, adequacy, and effectiveness in achieving organizational objectives.
controls.implementationGuidance: Review the ISMS periodically to ensure its suitability, adequacy, and effectiveness in achieving organizational objectives.

controls.title: Management review inputs
controls.description: Include inputs such as audit results, ISMS performance, risk status, improvement opportunities, and required changes in the management review.
controls.implementationGuidance: Include inputs such as audit results, ISMS performance, risk status, improvement opportunities, and required changes in the management review.

controls.title: Management review results
controls.description: Document the results of the management reviews, including decisions on improvements, ISMS changes, and resource requirements.
controls.implementationGuidance: Document the results of the management reviews, including decisions on improvements, ISMS changes, and resource requirements.

controls.title: Continual improvement
controls.description: Identify and act on opportunities for continual improvement to enhance the ISMS's effectiveness and alignment with organizational goals.
controls.implementationGuidance: Identify and act on opportunities for continual improvement to enhance the ISMS's effectiveness and alignment with organizational goals.

controls.title: Nonconformity and corrective action
controls.description: Address nonconformities by taking corrective actions, identifying root causes, and implementing measures to prevent recurrence while documenting the process.
controls.implementationGuidance: Address nonconformities by taking corrective actions, identifying root causes, and implementing measures to prevent recurrence while documenting the process.

controls.title: Policies for information security
controls.description: This control establishes and maintains information security policies aligned with organizational objectives. Measures include defining scope, setting goals, and ensuring alignment with compliance requirements.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control establishes and maintains information security policies aligned with organizational objectives. Measures include defining scope, setting goals, and ensuring alignment with compliance requirements.

controls.title: Information security roles and responsibilities
controls.description: This control defines and assigns roles and responsibilities for information security to ensure accountability. Measures include clear documentation of responsibilities, periodic reviews, and enforcement mechanisms.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control defines and assigns roles and responsibilities for information security to ensure accountability. Measures include clear documentation of responsibilities, periodic reviews, and enforcement mechanisms.

controls.title: Segregation of duties
controls.description: This control ensures segregation of duties to reduce the risk of errors, fraud, and unauthorized access. Measures include role separation, access restrictions, and regular audits.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures segregation of duties to reduce the risk of errors, fraud, and unauthorized access. Measures include role separation, access restrictions, and regular audits.

controls.description: This control ensures management responsibilities for information security are clearly defined and implemented. Measures include setting objectives, allocating resources, and overseeing compliance.
controls.implementationGuidance: This control ensures management responsibilities for information security are clearly defined and implemented. Measures include setting objectives, allocating resources, and overseeing compliance.
